title: More Advancements
description: A datapack with many creative advancements!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3acef5db99de48c158485a23a7af3fe8b69f7c2.png)
# Brief Introduction (English)
**Attention! This datapack is still unfinish, please install cautiously.**

This datapack add many interesting or difficult advancements! It includes almost in all aspects.  
Some even give you great rewards.  
Use the command: 

```
/function madv:all_advancements
```
  
then you can get all the advancements from this datapack.

You can download the Language Pack in the right version page.[Only add English(US)]\
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef5244a60298eb1438e7de0973da95a06bf0ed11.png)



# 简介 （简体中文）
**注意！这个数据包目前仍然未完成，请谨慎安装。**

这个数据包加入了很多有趣或者很困难的进度！
进度几乎涵盖了方方面面。
有些甚至会给你超独特的奖励！\
使用这个命令：`/function madv:all_advancements` 你可以获得数据包添加的所有进度（原版进度不包括）

你可以在单一版本的下载页面下载对应的语言包。[目前仅额外添加了English(US)语言]

![A advancement requires you to collect all kinds of stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8977f9a3adbbd7a851807ba588d4624f93fe18d2.png)\
A advancement requires you to collect all kinds of stone
